task_completion.visual_evidence: A spreadsheet application (like LibreOffice Calc) is open displaying the product pricing data.
The 'Version 2' sheet tab is selected and active at the bottom of the spreadsheet window.

task_completion.description: Highlight the changed prices for P1001 and P1003
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Version 2 sheet, the Unit Price cells for Product ID P1001 (27.99) and P1003 (49.99) have a distinct background color applied.

task_completion.description: Highlight the changed quantity for P1004 and name for P1006
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Version 2 sheet, the Stock Quantity cell for P1004 (135) and the Product Name cell for P1006 (HD Webcam) have a distinct background color applied.

task_completion.description: Highlight the changed category for P1008 and price for P1009
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Version 2 sheet, the Category cell for P1008 (Office Supplies) and the Unit Price cell for P1009 (17.99) have a distinct background color applied.

task_completion.description: Save the modifications to the spreadsheet
task_completion.visual_evidence: The save icon is clicked, or there is no unsaved changes indicator (like an asterisk next to the filename) in the title bar after highlighting.

integrity.description: The agent used a graphical spreadsheet application to perform the task
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a GUI spreadsheet tool (e.g., LibreOffice Calc) rather than a text editor or terminal script modifying the ODS file directly.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a Python or bash script to bypass manual highlighting
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows open showing scripts (like python or bash) being executed to parse and modify the ODS file automatically.

integrity.description: Highlights are applied to Version 2, not Version 1
integrity.visual_evidence: The background colors are visibly applied while the 'Version 2' tab is active. The 'Version 1' sheet should remain unhighlighted.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The dataset contains 10 products. Exactly 6 cells differ between Version 1 and Version 2. The agent must highlight these 6 specific cells in the 'Version 2' sheet with a background color: 1) P1001 Unit Price (changed to 27.99), 2) P1003 Unit Price (changed to 49.99), 3) P1004 Stock Quantity (changed to 135), 4) P1006 Product Name (changed to HD Webcam), 5) P1008 Category (changed to Office Supplies), and 6) P1009 Unit Price (changed to 17.99). To pass, the agent must achieve an F1 score >= 0.80 (meaning at least 5 of the 6 correct cells are highlighted, with minimal incorrect highlights).
